_comment: Phase 3b.1 (2026-05-18): cert config lives in lineage-engine alongside the template + font for now. Per spec §17.13.5 the long-term source of truth is truesight_me/programs/<slug>/manifest.json::certificate; we'll lift these fields up there in Phase 3b.2. Coordinates measured against the rasterized 859x612pt blank template. QR placement is operator-proposed bottom-right corner inside the ornamental border — iterate with Bilal if a different spot is preferred.
